title: Condominium Manager
description:
Job Description:


Supervise and coordinate the work of maintenance staff, cleaners, and other service providers to ensure the upkeep of common areas and facilities

  • Manage budgets, financial records, and service contracts for the condominium
  • Communicate effectively with residents, addressing their concerns and facilitating a positive living environment
  • Organise and attend meetings with the condominium's management committee
  • Ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and the condominium's by-laws
  • Develop and implement strategies to enhance the overall value and appeal of the property.
  • Review all contracts, agreements and insurance before their expiry and recommend renewal or call for quotation / tender.
  • Carry out all maintenance functions to the highest standard expected for the client and the subsidiary proprietors

Job Requirements:

  • Applicants must be willing to work a 5.5 days work week.
  • Diploma or Degree in Estate Management or related discipline.
  • Minimum 4-5 years of experience in property management, preferably in the residential condominium sector
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships with residents, service providers, and the management committee
  • Excellent organisational and problem-solving skills, with a keen eye for detail
  • Working knowledge of relevant laws, regulations, and best practices in property management
  • Proficient in using property management software and Microsoft Office applications
  • Conversant in Building Maintenance and Strata Management Act.
  • Ability to handle pressure and multiple tasks.
  • Salary will commensurate with experience and qualification.
  • Accredited Strata Manager Certification is preferred.

postedCompany.description:
Company Overview

Smart Property Management (Singapore) Pte Ltd has a team of dedicated and dynamic professionals with years of experience in real estate and property management and is well equipped with good knowledge of the rules and regulations governing Strata Title Management.

 

You can be assured that our team of professionals will, in their best capacity and ability, ensure that your property and facilities are maintained efficiently and effectively.

 

Our team is trained in handling feedback from owners and occupiers and can deliver sound advice upon analyzing issues and where necessary carry out prompt repairs/ rectifications to ensure the safety and pleasant living or work environment of the owners and occupiers.

 

We place emphasis on recognizing staff contributions and dedications and also provide continuous staff training to broaden their knowledge. This will enable them to provide a high level of quality in their services rendered to our customers.

Why Join Us

“Our people our most valued assets”

We hope to nurture them in a conducive and collaborative environment, and encourage them to achieve beyond their potential. At Smart Property Management, we take pride in building trusting and supportive relationships, and instil the right attitudes in our people. We are committed to providing both soft skills and in-depth product knowledge training for our people and pride ourselves in attracting and developing exceptional talent.
postedCompany.name: SMART PROPERTY MANAGEMENT (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
